Cliff Coast

Rocky shoreline with blue water and a wide sky.

Forest Lights

A vivid display of the aurora borealis.

Nature Walk

Explore the beauty of nature through peaceful trails.

Mountain View

Clouds drifting over a peaceful mountain landscape.

Golden Sunset

Witness the golden hour as the sun sets on the horizon.
script.js:
/* NO JAVASCRIPT REQUIRED!
   This entire component is built with pure CSS.
   
   All interactive features are handled by CSS:
   ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
   → Hover expand effect      → CSS flex transition
   → Grayscale to color       → CSS filter transition
   → Slide-up description     → CSS transform transition
   → Shimmer loading          → CSS @keyframes animation
   → Keyboard focus states    → CSS :focus-visible
   → Touch interactions       → CSS :active pseudo-class
   → Reduced motion support   → CSS @media query
   → Responsive layout        → CSS @media query
   
   Why no JavaScript?
   ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
   ✓ Better performance (no runtime overhead)
   ✓ Works with JS disabled
   ✓ No dependencies to maintain
   ✓ Simpler codebase
   ✓ GPU-accelerated animations
   ✓ Accessibility built into the browser
   
   "The best JavaScript is no JavaScript."
   — Every browser's rendering engine   
*/
